description: Ground truth for UnsafeToken — vulnerable ERC20-like token with 3 known issues.

vulnerabilities.description: The approve function directly sets allowance without increaseAllowance/decreaseAllowance pattern. Susceptible to front-running race condition.
Reward calculation relies on block.timestamp which can be manipulated by miners within a small window.
delegatecall to arbitrary target allows the called contract to overwrite storage, potentially taking ownership or draining funds.
